en_title: The Wolf Among Us 2: The First Preview
cn_title: 《我们身边的狼2》实机演示首曝：改用虚幻5引擎
subtitle: 再见了，老朋友
opus_summary: 《我们身边的狼2》在经历工作室倒闭、两次公布后，终于在夏日游戏节上展示了闭门实机演示。游戏已从Telltale引擎迁移至Unreal Engine 5，保留原作漫画风格，并采用一次性完整发售。

paragraphs.en: Along with the first season of Tales from the Borderlands, 2013's The Wolf Among Us is my favorite of Telltale's many classic narrative adventure games. Which is why when a second season was first announced in 2017 -- yes, it goes back to The Before Times -- I was as excited as anyone else. But as you may recall, things got messy after that. Not just because of a global pandemic, but because Telltale imploded in 2018 before being revived in 2019 -- at which point The Wolf Among us 2 was re-announced.
paragraphs.cn: 与《无主之地传说》第一季一样，2013年的《我们身边的狼》是我最爱的Telltale经典叙事冒险游戏之一。因此，当第二季在2017年首次公布时——没错，那还是「疫情前时代」——我和所有人一样兴奋。但你可能还记得，之后事情变得一团糟。不仅因为全球疫情，还因为Telltale在2018年倒闭，随后在2019年复活——此时《我们身边的狼2》被重新公布。

paragraphs.en: So yes, if you're keeping track, this sequel has already suffered a studio closure, two announcements, and then, after all that...it disappeared. At one point, AdHoc studio -- the ex-Telltale folks who brought us last year's tremendous Dispatch in the same narrative adventure genre, but that fell apart.
paragraphs.cn: 所以，如果你在追踪，这部续作已经经历了工作室倒闭、两次公布，然后……它消失了。一度，AdHoc工作室——那些前Telltale员工，去年给我们带来了同类型的出色叙事冒险游戏《超英派遣中心》——但那个项目也黄了。

paragraphs.en: In came additional developer Trick Studios and publisher PM Studios, and the project is finally back on track. But there was yet another complication: the work that had been done was on the Telltale Engine -- yes, the same framework that was already obviously creaky and flawed back when the original iteration of Telltale was still putting out games on the Xbox One and PS4.
paragraphs.cn: 后来，额外开发商Trick Studios和发行商PM Studios加入，项目终于重回正轨。但还有另一个复杂问题：之前的工作都是在Telltale引擎上完成的——没错，就是那个在Telltale最初版本还在Xbox One和PS4上发布游戏时就已经明显老化和有缺陷的框架。

paragraphs.en: Fast-forward to last week's Summer Game Fest Showcase and The Wolf Among Us 2's THIRD reveal. The difference this time: they actually showed the game behind closed doors as proof of life. Yes, I've seen it. It's real, and it's now running on Unreal Engine 5. It still retains the same comic book-style look the original did, but it's running on modern tech that should result in clean performance on most platforms. Oh, and while The Wolf Among Us 2 will still be structured episodically, it will be released all at once as one single 8-12 hour game.
paragraphs.cn: 快进到上周的夏日游戏节，《我们身边的狼2》迎来了第三次公布。这次的不同之处在于：他们真的在闭门演示中展示了游戏，证明它还活着。是的，我看到了。它是真的，现在运行在Unreal Engine 5上。它仍然保留了原作那种漫画风格的外观，但运行在现代技术上，应该能在大多数平台上获得流畅的性能。哦，还有，虽然《我们身边的狼2》仍将采用章节式结构，但会一次性完整发售，游戏时长约8-12小时。

paragraphs.en: Gameplay-wise, it's going to feel familiar to anyone who's played the first season of The Wolf Among Us -- or any other Telltale game, for that matter. The sequel is set six months after the conclusion of the original, and our hero Bigby Wolf finds himself the hunted rather than the hunter, on the trail of a serial killer but two steps behind.
paragraphs.cn: 从玩法上讲，玩过《我们身边的狼》第一季——或者任何其他Telltale游戏——的人都会感到熟悉。续作设定在原作结局六个月后，我们的英雄大灰狼比格比发现自己从猎人变成了猎物，他在追踪一名连环杀手，但总是慢两步。

paragraphs.en: My demo scene found Bigby with a detective named Faye investigating the apartment of their prime suspect. Faye finds a note on a strange stone table in the middle of the apartment -- a note with Bigby's name on it. She immediately questions Bigby, wondering if he's involved. This prompts a dialogue choice -- they're a staple of Telltale games and they will absolutely play a prominent role in the sequel. I chose to deny any nefarious intentions, which she was naturally skeptical of.
paragraphs.cn: 我的演示场景中，比格比与一名叫Faye的侦探一起调查他们主要嫌疑人的公寓。Faye在公寓中央一张奇怪的石桌上发现了一张纸条——上面写着比格比的名字。她立刻质问比格比，怀疑他是否与此有关。这触发了对话选择——这是Telltale游戏的标志性元素，在续作中绝对会扮演重要角色。我选择了否认任何邪恶意图，她自然表示怀疑。

paragraphs.en: Still, that eerie note left Bigby thinking that the killer knew they'd be coming, and he suggested to Faye that they get out of there immediately. Faye agreed, but as they headed for the door, the door slammed shut. It's magic, Bigby tells a disbelieving Faye.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管如此，那张诡异的纸条让比格比觉得杀手知道他们会来，他建议Faye立即离开。Faye同意了，但就在他们走向门口时，门砰地关上了。是魔法，比格比对难以置信的Faye说。

paragraphs.en: From here you get to explore the apartment with a bit more freedom than we've had in past Telltale games. The camera goes over Bigby's shoulder and you can search for additional clues -- not to mention a way out. A closer look at a bookcase with a series of half-pulled-out tomes. One poem-related puzzle later and you've opened the secret door, which itself yields a clue needed to show you the correct symbol to arrange with three plates on that weird middle-of-the-apartment stone table.
paragraphs.cn: 从这里开始，你可以比过去的Telltale游戏更自由地探索公寓。镜头切换到比格比的肩后视角，你可以搜索额外线索——更不用说找出口了。仔细查看一个书架上的一系列半抽出的书卷。解开一个与诗歌相关的谜题后，你打开了暗门，暗门本身又提供了一个线索，告诉你如何用三块盘子在那张奇怪的公寓中央石桌上排列出正确的符号。

paragraphs.en: It was a short demo -- not to mention a very early one. There were missing dialogue-choice prompts and placeholder VO, but as The Wolf Among Us 2 isn't due out until sometime next year, it didn't really matter. At this stage, what matters is that somehow, The Wolf Among Us 2 is still alive, and I couldn't be happier about it.
paragraphs.cn: 这是一个简短的演示——更不用说还非常早期。缺少对话选择提示，配音也是占位用的，但鉴于《我们身边的狼2》要到明年某个时候才发售，这其实无关紧要。在这个阶段，重要的是《我们身边的狼2》不知怎么还活着，而我对此再高兴不过了。

paragraphs.en: Ryan McCaffrey is IGN's executive editor of previews and host of both IGN's weekly Xbox show, Podcast Unlocked , as well as our semi-retired interview show, IGN Unfiltered . He's a North Jersey guy, so it's "Taylor ham," not "pork roll." Debate it with him on Twitter at @DMC_Ryan .
paragraphs.cn: Ryan McCaffrey是IGN的预览执行编辑，也是IGN每周Xbox节目《Podcast Unlocked》以及半退休的访谈节目《IGN Unfiltered》的主持人。他是北泽西人，所以他说「Taylor火腿」，而不是「猪肉卷」。在Twitter上@DMC_Ryan和他争论吧。
